--- 
title: "My Notes During PhD"
author: "Yongqi Wang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
url: https://wyq977.github.io/phd-notes
# cover-image: path to the social sharing image like images/cover.jpg
description: |
  This is a e-book of my notes and reflections of my notes during my PhD
github-repo: wyq977/phd-notes
---

# About

This book (hopefully) will contained my notes and thoughts during my PhD career at CWI.
